name: Baked Cod with Italian Breadcrumbs
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup finely chopped fresh mixed herbs
3 tbsp grated or finely chopped parmesan
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. Remove any bones from the fillets using needle-nose pliers.
3. Melt butter in a baking dish in the oven.
4. In a bowl, combine breadcrumbs, herbs, parmesan, and enough melted butter to make the breadcrumbs stick together. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
5. Mound about 1/4 of the breadcrumb mixture on each fillet and pat it down firmly.
6. Place the fillets in the baking dish with the melted butter.
7. Bake for 20 minutes, or until the fish is milky white and flaky. Serve immediately.
Yield: 4 servings
